Name: Airdrop as a Service Dev Bounty
Description:
SolRazr’s mission is to help developers raise capital and build fast on Solana. As part of that product suite, they would like to provide airdrop as a service to any project planning to do airdrops.

They are looking for a dApp (web/desktop) with an intuitive UI that can send tokens to thousands of addresses, essentially batching transfer of tokens. Used for airdrop campaigns, or any use case that needs transfers to a large number of addresses. The user should be able to link their wallet to the app, provide a file with addresses to transfer, and the app should do the transfer and provide downloadable results.
Mission: Create a dApp on the dev/testnet to enable airdrop-as-a-service. Record a 1 minute demo video and submit your source code.
Rewards:
🥇 First Prize 

  • $1,500 worth of SOLR for a working application
  • up to $1,000 of SOLR variable based on features delivered
  • Total Potential First Prize: $2,500 of SOLR
Evaluation Criteria:
• Did you provide a link to your working application on devnet or testnet?
  • Did you create a demo video (<1min) and Github repo link with the source code?
  • Design - How intuitive and easy is the user experience, and documentation?
  • Functional - How well does the application work?
  • Scale - How well does it work for large number of addresses/transactions?
  • Summary - Is the Success/Failure summary surfaced to easily fix any issues?
  • Security - Is your application very secure (e.g. private key stays only on the client)?
Resources:
• Simple Python Script to do Airdrops via CLI (created by Solrazr)
  • Example from the ETH Ecosystem
  • SolrRazr Website
  • Medium
  • Twitter
  • Documentation

For any questions, head to the SuperteamDAO Discord and ask in the #study-group channel. 

Alternatively, DM @abbasshaikh42 on Twitter or @abbasshaikh in our Discord.

​
Terms and Conditions: Participation in this bounty is entirely voluntary. Bounties are a way to learn and dabble in opportunities to build in web3. These are neither full time jobs nor project based engagement. Please be advised that the sponsors will not have time for individualised feedback due to the number of entries we receive.

Name: Amulet UI/UX Review
Description:
Amulet is the first insurance protocol for the Rust ecosystem, starting with Solana. They are built as a flexible protocol enabling them to provide many different type of insurance products. Some of their initial insurance products are:

  • Smart Contract Risk
  • Stablecoin de-peg Risk

Amulet has designed an innovative and open insurance model, which not only effectively addresses the common challenges of existing decentralized insurance protocols, but also creates a new paradigm shift for the whole insurance sector.

What is unique about Amulet

All traditional and DeFi insurance  protocols attack staked / invested funds in order to pay out claims, this diminishes returns and impacts relationships creating an unsustainable model. Amulets unique structure enables them to pay out claims without impacting staked capital.

Enabled by Solana they have designed Protocol-Controlled Underwriting (PCU).

The PCUutilses a proof of stake validator and other methods to generate yields. These Yields are tokenised into their future yield pool creating layers of protection between a claim and your staked assets. Meaning they can always payout claims whilst generating significant yields for stakers.

Current state

Their testnet is functional, but not very intuitive. They have docs, etc., in place but need an extra community review.

Bounty goals

  • Review their documentation, analyze their user flows and interaction.
  • The ultimate aims for Amulet is to make it easy for users to understand the platform and its benefits, and the number of clicks required to purchase, without compromising on use experience.
Mission: Conduct a thorough UI/UX review for Amulet that matches [this example] (https://bit.ly/3BEOVu5)in quality. You're welcome to complete this review individually or in teams of 2. Bounties will be split among team members.
Rewards:
🥇 First Prize:

  • $2500 USDC
  • Membership in the SuperteamDAO
  • Syndication on our social media

🥈 Second Prize

  • $500 USDC
  • Contributor role in the SuperteamDAO

🥉 Third Prize

  • $250 USDC
  • Contributor role in the SuperteamDAO

​

‍
Evaluation Criteria:
Depth

  • Did you identify problems for each screen you examined?
  • Did you explain what the user goals are for the different areas of the product you're reviewing?
  • Did you include screenshots of the existing designs?
  • Did you create a new design that solves the problems you identified?
  • Did you package your review into a nice presentation (e.g. Notion, Google Slides, Figma, etc.)?

Submission Requirements

  • Share your submission on Twitter & tag @superteamdao + @Amulet & use the hashtag #Superteambounty and submit this link in your bounty application.
Resources:
• Amulet Website
  • Amulet Blog
  • Amulet Testnet
  • Amulet Discord

For any questions, DM [@Abbasshaikh42] (https://twitter.com/Abbasshaikh42)on Twitter or @abbas in our Discord

​

Name: Atani Deep Dive Copy
Description:
Atani DEX Aggregator  is the most advanced DEX aggregator on Solana. Their platform (http://dex.atani.com/app/#) is the first to bring advanced orders (stop-loss, take-profit) to Serum, enables automatic and manual fund settlement, in addition to an end-to-end suite of token search, portfolio tracking, price alerts and advanced TradingView charting tools.

The goal of Atani is to become the leading DEX aggregator for the Solana ecosystem by providing the best trading experience and removing the friction of fragmentation.

Atani DEX Aggregator has been launched as a beta by the Atani team, whose flagship product, the Atani CEX Aggregator enables non-custodial and real-time trade execution, portfolio tracking, advanced technical analysis and tax reporting for 9,000+ trading instruments across 20+ of the largest global centralized crypto exchanges. By integrating the product roadmaps of the Atani CEX Aggregator and DEX Aggregator they aim to reduce the friction for users trading across both CEXs and DEXs and become the ‘de facto’ door to the Solana DeFi ecosystem for CEX users.

Atani DEX is sponsoring a deep dive bounty for their DEX Aggregator platform. The winning submission will talk about its various features and provide a detailed breakdown for anybody that wants to get started.
Mission: Become an expert on Atani DEX Aggregator and summarize your findings in a written essay. You're welcome to write this review individually or in teams of 2. Bounties will be split among team members.
Rewards:
🥇 First Prize

  • $700 USDC
  • Membership in the SuperteamDAO
  • Syndication in our newsletter and social media

‍🥈 Second Prize

  • $300 USDC

‍🥉 Third Prize

  • $200 USDC
Evaluation Criteria:
Depth

  • Did you explore the background of Atani?
  • Did you talk about all the key features of Atani?
  • Did you talk about the Advanced Orders (Take Profit / Stop Loss both Market and Limit) features?
  • Is your essay the one-stop-resource for people to get up to speed with this project?
  • Did you join their Telegram and get a feel for the community?

Writing Style

  • Did you write a compelling introduction and a satisfying conclusion?
  • Is your writing easy and fun to read?
  • Did you avoid overly complex jargon?
  • Did you explain concepts in a way a person new to crypto could understand?
Resources:
1. Working Paper (Vision / roadmap)
  2. Walkthrough Atani DEX
  3. Video of Atani DEX
  4. Value proposition of Atani DEX
  • Search tokens available in Serum to trade
  • Track your portfolio while you trade
  • Trade (includes advanced orders)
  • Settle your funds (manually & automatically)
  • Atani DEX Landing page
  • Atani DEX Aggregator App
  • Atani Twitter
  • Atani landing page (CEX Aggregator)
  • Atani Telegram

For any questions, DM @abbasshaikh42 on Twitter or @abbasshaikh in our Discord

Name: Biconomy Deep Dive
Description:
Web3 applications today face major roadblocks to user adoption in the form of terrible user onboarding & transaction experience. Almost every interaction with a dApp is a complex transaction for users. In comparison to intuitive web2 products that people are used to, dApp's can be extremely frustrating.

Through Biconomy's powerful and easy to use SDK/APIs, you can enable a simple and customized transaction journey so that your end users don't get intimidated by blockchain complexities. This enables seamless interactions between your application and your end-users.
Mission: Write an introductory piece to Biconomy, clearly communicating how Biconomy is building key infrastructure for web3. You're welcome to write this review individually or in teams of 2. Bounties will be split among team members.
Rewards:
🥇 First Prize

  • $500 USDT
  • Membership in the SuperteamDAO
  • Syndication in our newsletter and social media

🥈 Second Prize

  • $300 USDT

🥉 Third Prize

  • $200 USDT
Evaluation Criteria:
Depth

  • Did you explore the background of Biconomy?
  • Did you talk about all the key features of Biconomy?
  • Did you explain how meta-transactions and cross-chain transfers are integral to mainstream web3 adoption?
  • Is your essay the one-stop-resource for people to get up to speed with this project?
  • Did you join their Discord and get a feel for the community?

Writing Style

  • Did you write a compelling introduction and a satisfying conclusion?
  • Is your writing easy and fun to read?
  • Did you avoid overly complex jargon?
  • Did you explain concepts in a way a person new to crypto could understand?

Note: We are currently only accepting submissions in English

  • Check out previous bounty winners to get a sense of the quality we expect.
Resources:
• Biconomy Website
  • Biconomy Twitter
  • Biconomy Medium
  • Biconomy Discord
  • For any questions, DM @abbasshaikh42 on Twitter or @abbasshaikh in our Discord

Through Biconomy's powerful and easy to use SDK/APIs, you can enable a simple and customized transaction journey so that your end users don't get intimidated by blockchain complexities. This enables seamless interactions between your application and your end-users.
Mission: Write an introductory piece to Biconomy, clearly communicating how Biconomy is building key infrastructure for web3. You're welcome to write this review individually or in teams of 2. Bounties will be split among team members.

Name: Build a Filecoin Project and apply for the Microgrant
Description:
To date, the Filecoin project has focused primarily on research, specification and implementation of a decentralized storage network protocol. Throughout this process they’ve worked with incredible community members and contributors. Some are already building tools on the budding network in active development.

The Filecoin Dev Grant program was created to reward ongoing & existing contributions that add great value to the Filecoin ecosystem, inspire more contributors to solve open problems & seed the creation of new products, businesses and tools to increase the utility of Filecoin

Filecoin is now looking to fund talented and eager teams that want to work with them to build a more robust, efficient, and decentralized web.
Mission:
Build a Solana project that leverages Filecoin and apply for the micro-grant.

​

You're welcome to work in teams!
Rewards:
🥇 First Prize: 

  • $5000 USD of FIL

​
Evaluation Criteria:
Proposal templates can be found on our GitHub site. Generally, all projects must meet the following requirements:

  • All projects must be open-sourced.
  • All projects must be dual-licensed under MIT and APACHE2 licenses.
  • All teams must be self-managed.

Once you submit a proposal, a member of the Dev Grants team will review it on GitHub and either approve, reject, or request changes on your proposal. If your grant is approved, congratulations! We’ll connect with all grant winners to finalize legal and financial details, funding milestones, and timeframe.

Name: Build on $FORGE at the Delhi Hacker House
Description:
Blocksmith Labs is a team of experienced engineers aiming to solve real problems on Solana, whilst providing utility to their holders. To demonstrate this in practise, they have already released their first tool, Mercury. 

One of the big problems in the space right now is whitelisting, the whole process is tedious. Mercury (by Blocksmith Labs) solves this by making this whole process seamless for both users and projects. Users have a clear visibility of which projects they are whitelisted on, whilst allowing projects to see how many "true" users have been whitelisted on their projects — and the ability to export the users whitelist addresses quick and easy. 

Blocksmith Lab NFT holders can stake their NFTs to earn $FORGE tokens. $FORGE will then bring various utility throughout the future of this project, starting with allowing their holders to buy whitelist spots from the projects that they onboard, allowing easy future whitelisting for their holders.

$FORGE is the primary utility token of the Blocksmith Labs ecosystem across various products. They are now sponsoring a bounty to build a project that integrates their token $FORGE into a product and creates additional utility for the same.

Name: Coin98 Wallet Deep Dive Bounty
Description:
Coin98 is an all-in-one DeFi Platform that aims to fulfil untapped demand in Web3 and become a Gateway bridging TradFi users to any DeFi services on multiple blockchains. It accomplishes this mission through a full suite of products, including Coin98 Wallet, Coin98 Exchange, and Space Gate (cross-chain bridge).

Coin98 is sponsoring a bounty to dive deep into their platform, with the focus on Coin98 Wallet (Super App and Extension Wallet). Make sure to cover not just how the wallet works, but also what type of user is most beneficial of what Coin98 Wallet is trying to offer.
Mission:
Become an expert on Coin98 and summarize your findings in a written essay.

You're welcome to write this review individually or in teams of 2. Bounties will be split among team members.
Rewards:
🥇 First Prize

  • $700 USD worth of $C98
  • Membership in the SuperteamDAO
  • Syndication in our newsletter and social media

🥈 Second Prize

  • $200 USD worth of $C98

🥉 Third Prize

  • $100 USD worth of $C98
Evaluation Criteria:
Depth

  • Did you explore the background of the project?
  • Does your essay talk about the key features of the project (multichain, NFTs, native swap, web3 browser...)?
  • Is your essay the one-stop resource for people to get up to speed with this project?
  • Did you learn everything there is to know about the project?
  • Did you take screenshots, provide a step-by-step guide to onboarding, and clearly articulate the value the project offers?
  • Did you join the project’s Discord and get a feel for the community?
  • Did you try to compare and explain the relative pros/cons of this project versus others?

Writing Style

  • Did you write a compelling introduction and a satisfying conclusion?
  • Is your writing easy and fun to read?
  • Did you avoid overly complex jargon?
  • Did you explain concepts in a way a person new to crypto could understand?  

Submission Requirements

  • Did you write your essay in English?
  • Is your submission at least 1,000 words? Note that typical bounty winners are ~2,000 words.
  • Did you submit before the deadline? Note: there will be no deadline extensions.
  • Did you include links to your sources and references?

​

Check out previous bounty winners to get a sense of the quality we expect.

Name: Creator Economy Tools on Solana
Description:
In Web2, people made content and companies made the profits. In Web3, people who make content are able to own the upside of their work themselves. With its speed and low transaction fees, Solana is well suited to empower this next evolution of the Creator Economy.

The hardest part for web2 creators is understanding how they can transition into web3. For those not already into crypto, the list of options (NFTs, social tokens, gated content, etc) can feel overwhelming. Solana is sponsoring a deep dive bounty for an essay that solves this problem.

The winning essay should be an actionable guide that helps creators understand how to monetize their work with the tools available on Solana. Make sure to scour not just the existing Solana ecosystem, but also the newest projects coming from the Ignition hackathon.
Mission: Write a deep dive explaining how creators can approach monetization of their work on Solana. Research a comprehensive list of tools that exist to help Creators, and package them into a format easy enough for a non-crypto person to understand.
Rewards:
🥇 First Prize

  • $500 worth of USDC
  • Instant access to the SuperteamDAO as a Member
Evaluation Criteria:
Depth

  • Did you learn everything there is to know about how a creator could leverage Solana to make a living?
  • Is your essay the one-stop-resource for creators to get up to speed? Did you provide clear descriptions of the strategies and tools available, along with links and screenshots of relevant projects?
  • Were you comprehensive in your research?
  • Did you identify projects that have already launched, as well as projects that are launching in the near future (e.g. from the Ignition hackathon)?

‍Writing Style

  • Did you write a compelling introduction and a satisfying conclusion?
  • Is your writing easy and fun to read?
  • Did you avoid overly complex jargon?
  • Did you explain concepts in a way a person new to crypto could understand?

Check out previous bounty winners to get a sense of the quality we expect.
Resources:
• Ignition Hackathon Solana Projects
  • Power to the Person by Packy
  • How Blockchain Will Save the Creator Economy
  • Li Jin on the History and Evolution of the Creator Economy
  • List of Solana projects

For any questions, DM @kashdhanda on Twitter

Name: CropBytes Farming Deep Dive
Description:
CropBytes is the world's leading virtual economy game based entirely in crypto on the economics of real-world farming. Designed to truly represent the real world, you can work and earn a living within the game, just as you would in real life. It has been 4 years since CropBytes’ inception when the adoption of crypto assets was in its nascent stages. Today traders, players, and owners all play a large role in the game economics, allowing the economy to evolve based on the mechanics of demand & supply.

‍CBX token is an integral part of the CropBytes ecosystem. It is connected to all economic cycles in the game.

Cropbytes is now sponsoring a bounty to help inform players about the on-boarding process, gameplay & various other elements of the ecosystem.

The winning submission will provide players with an overview of the game, and the game economy and help explore a few strategies to grow their portfolio. The player should be able to use the free trial pack and be able to explore all the basic gameplay activities and start collecting extracts to mine CBX.

Get the players to understand how to deposit and withdraw funds, How to buy packs, and how to trade assets. How to build strategies to grow their portfolio & crypto farming business in the game. Inform them about the CropBytes community, army, and other programs that they can participate in to earn game assets and CBX tokens.
Mission:
Become an expert on CropBytes and summarize your findings in a written essay.

You're welcome to write this review individually or in teams of 2. Bounties will be split among team members.

🥇 First Prize

  • $1000 USD worth of CBX tokens dropped into your private ERC 20 wallet.

Name: DAO Tooling Ecosystem Deep Dive by Mesha
Description:
Mesha is building the financial stack for web3 organizations. Mesha provides expense and treasury management software to help web3 teams scale their financial operations. Its signature product is the corporate card program for DAOs and web3 companies –– letting anyone with crypto spend in fiat using the first-ever corporate card for web3 teams.

​

Mesha is now expanding to Solana and is now sponsoring a landscape deep dive into the Solana DAO tooling ecosystem.

​

The deep dive should include information such as:

  • What are the various projects being built? Such as governance, contributor payments, etc.
  • What are the core areas of focus and the missing gaps? 
  • What are the opportunities and the challenges? 
  • Please also include a comprehensive list of projects, core focus area (e.g. payments, DAO set up, wallet, etc), their status (live, pre-launch), if their APIs are open-source yet, and other observations. 

​
Mission: Become an expert on Solana DAO Tooling and summarize your findings in a written essay. You're welcome to write this review individually or in teams of 2. Bounties will be split among team members.
Rewards:
🥇 First Prize: 

  • $1000 USDC
  • Syndication in our newsletter and social media
  • You’ll be added as a Contributor in Superteam

​

🥈 Second Prize

  • $300 USDC

​

🥉 Third Prize

  • $200 USDC

​

    • Did you explore the projects and provide a detailed analysis?

    • Did you try the competition and explain relative pros/cons of the various projects?

​

    • Did you write your essay in English?

Name: Design the DAO Passport NFT
Description:
As the SuperteamDAO continues to grow, we want to celebrate new members by giving them a "Welcome to the DAO" NFT. This NFT will function as a passport for entry into the DAO, but also ought to be a standalone work of art.

The design may look like a ticket to an amusement park, a passport for a new digital country, an ID card, or something else entirely. We're leaving this purposefully vague - your imagination should be the only constraint.

‍
Mission: Design the "Welcome to the SuperteamDAO" NFT graphic.
Rewards:
🥇 First Prize

  • $500 USDC
  • Instant promotion to "Contributor Level 3" within the SuperteamDAO
Evaluation Criteria:
Requirements

  • Must include the name "SuperteamDAO" somewhere on the design
  • Must be submitted as a Figma, Invision, or other digitally editable design file
  • Must be at least 3000 px wide to ensure high resolution.
  • Note: no specific color scheme or font families are required.

Visual Design

  • Is your design aesthetically stunning?
  • Does your design fit in our brand personality?
  • Would we feel excited to see your NFT in our wallet everyday?
  • Would the greater community treat your NFT as a work of standalone art?
  • Bonus: is your design animated?‍
Resources: 0xStation's "Ticket to Ride"

‍

Name: Develop a Solana Index on Mudrex
Description:
The best investor in the world is probably not sitting on a Wall Street trading desk. He or she is sitting in their living room in India somewhere, generating mind-boggling returns. New financial platforms like Mudrex enable anyone, anywhere in the world, to benefit from the smartest crypto minds.

‍Mudrex is sponsoring a bounty for our community to create a new Coin Set around Solana projects on their platform. A Coin Set is a basket of crypto tokens based on a theme of your choosing. You can use any combination of tokens that are hosted on major exchanges like FTX, Binance, Coinbase, and OKEx and seamlessly create an investment vehicle around them. The winning thesis will be allowed to create a Coin Set on Mudrex's platform and will be eligible to receive 70% of fees generated by the Coin Set in 2022.
Mission: Create a thesis for a Coin Set based on Solana projects. Write an accompanying blog post to explain the thesis of your Coin Set, the tokens you will allocate to, and the weighting of each token within your Coin Set. Make sure to post your thesis to Twitter and tag @thecoinsets.
Rewards:
🥇 First Prize

  • $500 USDC
  • Instant access to the SuperteamDAO as a Member
  • 70% of the fees generated by the Coin Set in 2022

🥈 Second Prize

  • $300 USDC

🥉 Third Prize

  • $200 USDC
Evaluation Criteria:
Depth

  • Did you think deeply and write persuasively about your Solana ecosystem thesis?
  • Did you include the names of the tokens you'd include in your Coin Set?
  • Did you include the relative weightings for each token?
  • Does your Coin Set include tokens available on the Mudrex platform through FTX, BNB, Coinbase, and OKEx?

‍Thesis Writing Style

  • Did you write a compelling introduction and a satisfying conclusion?
  • Is your writing easy and fun to read?

Name: Ecosystem Page for Solana
Description:
The Solana ecosystem is extremely diverse and ever-growing with projects ranging from  AMM's, Analytical tools, DEX's, Games, NFT's to so much more.

With an ecosystem growing at the speed-of-light, it is vital to be able to build, maintain & grow a common hub for all projects to be listed & verified by the community.

Solana is now sponsoring a bounty to design an ecosystem page with various features.

The goal with this site would be to ensure that it represents the diversity of our ecosystem and enables anyone to quickly identify, read & connect with projects from any domain. 

Things to consider:

  • What information should a good ecosystem page display? (Eg: Socials, Documentation, Audits, Contracts, etc)
  • What would the user expect to see on the landing page or as an immediate CTA?
  • How does the user navigate the site?
  • How do we improve search & browsing?
  • What features would make the site better?
  • Types of categories/filters

Pages to be designed:

  1. Homepage
  2. Category Section
  3. Project Listings
  4. ‘Submit your project’
  5. Any new pages / sections that you think should be added (E.g., events/meetups page, wallets, etc.)

​
Mission: Design the Solana ecosystem page.
Rewards:
🥇 First Prize:

  • $2000 USDC
  • You’ll be added as a Member in Superteam

​

🥈 Second Prize

  • $750 USDC

​

🥉 Third Prize

  • $450 USDC
Evaluation Criteria:
Requirements

  • Did you identify problems and gaps with the existing ecosystem pages? 
  • Did you explain what the user goals are for the different areas/features of the site? 
  • Did you include screenshots of the existing designs? 
  • Did you create a new design that solves the problems you identified? 
  • Did you find creative ways to help the user navigate through crucial parts of the site?
  • Did you package your redesign into a nice presentation (e.g. Notion, Google Slides, Figma, etc)?

​

Submission Requirement

  • Share your submission on Twitter & tag @superteamdao + @solanafndn & use the hashtag #Superteambounty and submit this link in your bounty application.

​

• NEAR ecosystem page
  • Ethereum ecosystem page
  • Chainlink ecosystem site

Name: Evaluating Web3 Projects Deep Dive
Description:
The Web3 ecosystem has experienced a parabolic run in the last couple of years. Both in innovative projects as well as token prices. While this is great for adoption, it often attracts low-effort projects without any core fundamentals.

Having a strong due diligence process to evaluate these projects is essential and can help cut through the noise and allow individuals to make informed decisions while participating in this new world.

CoinDCX is sponsoring a bounty to help retail investors analyse web3 projects and evaluate team performance, core use case, governance, community engagement, tokenomics, & understand security risks before buying into these tokens.
Mission:
Become an expert on web3 protocol due diligence and help provide a framework to retail investors to make informed decisions.

You're welcome to write this review individually or in teams of 2. Bounties will be split among team members.
Rewards:
🥇 First Prize

  • $700 USDC
  • Syndication in our newsletter and social media
  • Contributor (Level 2) access to SuperteamDAO

🥈 Second Prize

  • $200 USDC

🥉 Third Prize

  • $100 USDC
Evaluation Criteria:
Depth

  • Did you provide a background about web3 and how protocols function?
  • Did you create a framework to help people new to crypto evaluate projects?
  • Did you discuss the importance of tokenomics, community, product use cases, and governance? Did you provide metrics or qualitative factors that people can use to understand the value of the projects?
  • Did you explain your framework with an example or two?
  • Did you include resources for further exploration?

Writing Style

  • Did you write a compelling introduction and a satisfying conclusion?
  • Is your writing easy and fun to read?
  • Did you avoid overly complex jargon?
  • Did you explain concepts in a way a person new to crypto could understand?

Submission Requirements

  • Did you write your essay in English?
  • Is your submission at least 1,000 words? Note that typical bounty winners are ~2,000 words.
  • Did you submit it before the deadline? Note: there will be no deadline extensions.
  • Did you include links to your sources and references?

Check out previous bounty winners to get a sense of the quality we expect.
Resources:
Superteam’s guidelines on how to write a great deep dive essay

‍For any questions, DM @Abbasshaikh42 on Twitter or @abbas in our Discord

‍

Name: Filecoin Solana Use Cases Deep Dive
Description:
Filecoin, the world’s largest decentralized storage network offers more than 16+ Exabytes of storage. It allows users to store, request, and transfer data via a verifiable marketplace. Filecoin is completely open-source, enabling people from all over the world to participate.

Filecoin is built on IPFS which is a peer-to-peer network and protocol designed to make the web faster, safer, and more open. IPFS upgrades the web to work peer to peer, addressing data by what it is instead of where it’s located on the network, or who is hosting it.

There are several projects supported by Protocol Labs which developers choose to integrate in the different projects they build.

Additionally, there are several tools that builders can use to build on top of Filecoin & IPFS or integrate them in their Dapps.

With this research, we are trying to understand:

  • Which projects from our stack could be the most useful for Solana builders?
  • Do they know about any of these projects?
  • If yes, which are these? What all do they know about them?
  • Are there any challenges in using them?
  • What are the best possible use-cases for Filecoin for Solana developers?
  • We have seen developers from different smart contract chains build applications across different spaces: Metaverse, DeFi, Gaming, etc. Winning projects from our hackathons here!
Mission:
Generate creative ideas & challenges to integrate Filecoin in the Solana ecosystem and summarize your findings in a written document. Bonus points for also identifying Dev-tooling / RFP ideas!

You're welcome to write this review individually or in teams of 2. Bounties will be split among team members.
Rewards:
🥇 First Prize

  • $1300 USD of FIL
  • Membership in the SuperteamDAO
  • Syndication in our newsletter and social media

🥈 Second Prize

  • $700 FIL

🥉 Third Prize (x2)

  • Filecoin Swag kit (For 2 contributors)
Evaluation Criteria:
Depth

  • Did you explore the background of the project?
  • Does your research write-up answer the key questions posted in the bounty?
  • Is your research write-up the one-stop-resource for people to get up to speed with this project?
  • Did you explore the tech stack supported by Protocol Labs and the projects that are part of it?
  • Did you explore all the tools that can be used to integrate Filecoin & IPFS in dapps?
  • Did you talk to developers to answer the questions?
  • Does your write-up include experience shared by developers from the Solana community?
  • Did you join the project’s Discord and get a feel for the community?
  • Do your recommendations have technical depth?

Writing Style

  • Did you write a compelling introduction and a satisfying conclusion?
  • Did you explain your points and back them up with examples?  

Submission Requirements

  • Did you write your essay in English?
  • Did you submit before the deadline? Note: there will be no deadline extensions.
  • Did you include links to your sources and references?

Check out previous bounty winners to get a sense of the quality we expect.

• Superteam’s guidelines on how to write a great deep dive essay
  • Filecoin & IPFS Resources for Builders: Website | Twitter | Discord | Office hours

Name: Fluidity Deep Dive
Description:
Fluidity Money tokens (Fluid Assets) are a 1-to-1 wrapped asset that exposes holders to randomly paid large dividend rewards. Dividends are paid out according to a drawing mechanism held on each transaction of their Fluid Assets. Dividends are generated by the cumulative yield created by every principal token deposited and lent on money markets.

After a successful launch on the Ethereum Testnet Fluidity is ready to go live on Solana Devnet.

Fluidity works by wrapping assets such as USDC into a “Fluid form”. 1 USDC gives you 1 ƒUSDC. It takes the principal and earns yield on it using Solend Protocol, which is distributed to the users of Fluid Assets.

Fluidity is sponsoring a bounty to help users - both those new to crypto and those new to Solana - better understand how Fluidity works & its use cases. The winning submission will put Fluidity in context, show how to use their platform, and adhere to our deep dive essay guidelines.

You can access the app on devnet: https://app.solana.beta.fluidity.money/ ( Switching to Devnet)
Mission:
Become an expert on Fluidity and summarize your findings in a written essay. Provide a detailed breakdown of Fluidity and its general value by studying its documentation and the app.

You're welcome to write this review individually or in teams of 2. Bounties will be split among team members.

‍
Rewards:
🥇 First Prize

  • $1,000 USDC
  • Membership in the SuperteamDAO
  • Syndication in our newsletter and social media

🥈 Second Prize

  • $300 USDC

🥉 Third Prize

  • $200 USDC
Evaluation Criteria:
Depth

  • Did you discuss the concept of yield generating protocols and their general value to a crypto ecosystem?
  • Did you compare/contrast Fluidity with other yield generating protocols on Solana?
  • Did you discuss the existing incentives around leaving interest-bearing products ”idle” and how Fluidity is different?
  • Did you explain utility mining?
  • Did you explain fluidity wars and how it’s different from curve wars?
  • Did you discuss the economics of Fluidity?
  • Did you include screenshots and instructions demonstrating how to use the project?
  • Does your essay talk about the key features of the project and it’s upcoming roadmap?
  • Is your essay the one-stop-resource for people to get up to speed with this project?

Writing Style

  • Did you explain concepts in a way a person new to crypto could understand?  
  • Did you write a compelling introduction and a satisfying conclusion?
  • Is your writing easy and fun to read?
  • Did you avoid overly complex jargon?

Friktion brings Portfolio Management to DeFi. Volts, Friktion’s quantitative yield strategies are built to generate returns across market cycles. Friktion’s Volts are built with principal protection, yield generation, and volatility in mind. Name: GARI Hype-Video Script Bounty
Description:
Chingari, powered by GARI is India’s fastest-growing short-video app launched in 2018. Since then, the home-grown app has emerged as the one-stop destination for entertaining, engaging videos across diverse categories such as dancing, singing, transformation, innovative skills, etc. Chingari’s eclectic platform entertains 130M+ users across India, and witnesses videos in 15+ languages.

$GARI Social Token, was launched by Chingari- India’s fastest growing short-video app in 2021. With a combined community of 130M+ and growing, $GARI was introduced as a social token for the Chingari creators to create engaging content and for users to engage with the content. These tokens are not only tradeable for their local currency but also provide governance authority over Chingar’s future developments.

To incentivize creators and users that are more active than others, GARI is creating a program that allows users to mint badges based on their activity on the platform. These badges in-turn lead to rewards in the form of GARI tokens.

The objective of this bounty is to create a hype-video to drive awareness around GARI’s mining program. The winning video will be produced by GARI’s team and marketed on all social media platforms.
Mission:
Understand the GARI mining program, its incentivization structure, and reward mechanism.

Based on your understanding, write a 1-minute script for a hype-video to drive awareness around the GARI mining program.

Note that the type of video required is an animation typography video that involves no shoot (Motion graphic video)

You're welcome to write this review individually or in teams of 2. Bounties will be split among team members.
Rewards:
🥇 First Prize

  • $1000 USDC
  • Opportunity to work with the Chingari Team on another script for $1500 USDC
  • You’ll be added as a Contributor in SuperteamDAO

🥈 Second Prize

  • $500 USDC
Evaluation Criteria:
1. Clarity of understanding of the mining program:
  2. - Did you understand the mining program in detail?
  3. - Did you cover all aspects of the mining program through your script?
  4. - Once produced, will the video be educational and informative for the average Chingari user?
  5. Clarity of understanding of the mining program:
  6. - Did you understand the mining program in detail?
  7. - Did you cover all aspects of the mining program through your script?
  8. - Once produced, will the video be educational and informative for the average Chingari user?
  9. Visuals and detailing:
  10. - Did you give enough visuals for the motion graphics designer to put it together?
  11. Reference to videos and music tracks is a bonus.
  12. Out of the box thinking.
Resources:
• Medium blog on GARI Mining
  • Hype Video Script Examples
  • Gari Website

For any questions, [DM @Abbasshaikh42] (http://(https://twitter.com/Abbasshaikh42))on Twitter or @abbas in our Discord

Name: GARI Short Video Bounty
Description:
Chingari, powered by GARI is India’s fastest-growing short-video app launched in 2018. Since then, the home-grown app has emerged as the one-stop destination for entertaining, engaging videos across diverse categories such as dancing, singing, transformation, innovative skills, etc. Chingari’s eclectic platform entertains 130M+ users across India, and witnesses videos in 15+ languages.

$GARI Social Token, was launched by Chingari- India’s fastest growing short-video app in 2021. With a combined community of 130M+ and growing, $GARI was introduced as a social token for the Chingari creators to create engaging content and for users to engage with the content. These tokens are not only tradeable for their local currency but also provide governance authority over Chingar’s future developments.

To incentivize creators and users that are more active than others, GARI is creating a program that allows users to mint badges based on their activity on the platform. These badges in-turn lead to rewards in the form of GARI tokens.

The objective of this bounty is to create short reel like videos to drive awareness around GARI’s mining program. The winning videos will be shared by GARI’s team on Chingari's app and might even be included on its social media platforms.
Mission:
Understand the GARI mining program, its incentivization structure, and reward mechanism.

Based on your understanding, create fun short videos (Reel format) to drive awareness around the GARI mining program.

Note that the format of video required is 30-45 second short format. There is no restriction on creativity as long as the video is fun and engaging.

You're welcome to prepare these videos individually or in teams. Bounties will be split among team members.
Rewards:
🥇 First Prize

  • $1000 USDC : Top 5 submissions will receive $200 each
  • You’ll be added as a Contributor in SuperteamDAO‍
Evaluation Criteria:
1. Quality of the script:
  2. - Is the script of the reel engaging?
  3. - Does it cover basic concepts from a users point of view?
  4. Quality of video:
  5. - How well produced is the video?
  6. - Are the edits and transitions seamless?
  7. Creative engagement: Is the video fun to watch for a user? Will it drive engagement on the Chingari platform?
  8. References: Are you taking fun and relatable references from current trends?  
  9. Understanding of the program: Does the reel display that you understood the core value proposition of the program and communicated it with the end-user?
Resources:
• Medium blog on GARI Mining
  • Gari Website
  • Mining Badges

Name: How to Manage a Web3 Community
Description: Communities are the core of all things Web3. Everything from DAOs to NFT Projects to protocols depend on their early believers. Creating a welcoming, productive and safe environment for your members is extremely important.  How do you ensure that a member finds value in being a part of your community? How do create a community that is sticky? And how do you manage the information overload that plagues so many communities?
Mission: Write a detailed explainer on the best practices of Web3 community management.
Rewards:
🥇 First Prize

  • $500 USDC
  • Membership in the SuperteamDAO
  • Syndication in our newsletter and social media
Evaluation Criteria:
Depth

  • Did you consider all the elements of community management?
  • Did you cover common tools used by Web3 community builders?
  • Did you identify key processes, activities, and events needed to build a community?
  • Did you provide a framework for how someone should think about Web3 community management?
  • Is your essay the one-stop-resource for people to get up to speed with Web3 community management?
  • Did you provide a clear list of best practices and/or topics to consider for aspiring community builders?

Writing Style

  • Did you write a compelling introduction and a satisfying conclusion?
  • Is your writing easy and fun to read?
  • Did you avoid overly complex jargon?
  • Did you explain concepts in a way a person new to crypto could understand?

Name: How to Value a Community
Description:
A good community is extremely valuable to any project/service in the web3 world. Communities are incentivised to contribute, be evangelists for your project, drive distribution and create massive value in exchange for a stake in the upside.

The question is: how do you financially value a community? There are clear frameworks for valuing a company through discounted cash flows and other means. But no frameworks exist for evaluating the communities which will form the bedrock of Web3.

What are the key metrics to examine? Are there models to be found in the way countries calculate GDP? Are there other historical models that can be applied? Or is an entirely new framework required to make sense of these new communities?
Mission: Create a framework or model for valuing various types of Web3 communities.
Rewards:
🥇 First Prize

  • $500 USD
  • Membership in the SuperteamDAO
  • Syndication in our newsletter and social media
Evaluation Criteria:
Depth

  • Did you consider all the aspects of a Web3 community?
  • Did you identify the key processes, activities, and events that are integral to a community?
  • Did you take into account the various forms of output a community can generate? Distribution, funding etc?
  • Did you provide a framework that can accommodate various communities in the Web3 space?
  • Is your essay the one-stop-resource for people to understand how to value a community?
  • Did you provide appropriate examples & references?

Writing Style

  • Did you write a compelling introduction and a satisfying conclusion?
  • Is your writing easy and fun to read?
  • Did you avoid overly complex jargon?
  • Did you explain concepts in a way a person new to crypto could understand?
Resources:
• Rafa's tweet on metrics for communities
  • Shreyas on other community metrics

Name: How to Value a Community
Description:
A good community is extremely valuable to any project/service in the web3 world. Communities are incentivised to contribute, be evangelists for your project, drive distribution and create massive value in exchange for a stake in the upside.

The question is: how do you financially value a community? There are clear frameworks for valuing a company through discounted cash flows and other means. But no frameworks exist for evaluating the communities which will form the bedrock of Web3.

What are the key metrics to examine? Are there models to be found in the way countries calculate GDP? Are there other historical models that can be applied? Or is an entirely new framework required to make sense of these new communities?
Mission: Create a framework or model for valuing various types of Web3 communities.
Rewards:
🥇 First Prize

  • $500 USD
  • Membership in the SuperteamDAO
  • Syndication in our newsletter and social media
Evaluation Criteria:
Depth

  • Did you consider all the aspects of a Web3 community?
  • Did you identify the key processes, activities, and events that are integral to a community?
  • Did you take into account the various forms of output a community can generate? Distribution, funding etc?
  • Did you provide a framework that can accommodate various communities in the Web3 space?
  • Is your essay the one-stop-resource for people to understand how to value a community?
  • Did you provide appropriate examples & references?

Name: Hubble Protocol Deep Dive
Description:
Hubble Protocol is on a mission to supercharge liquidity on Solana. It gives users the opportunity to access the capital trapped in their HODLed tokens, and the protocol allows users to earn yield while they borrow at extremely capital-efficient rates.

Hubble Protocol plans three initial phases of development as the project works to expand the number of DeFi 2.0 services on Solana. Hubble’s first phase centers on zero-interest multi-asset borrowing and the minting of USDH, a Solana-native 100% decentralized crypto-backed stablecoin. Phase 2 focuses on structured products, while Phase 3 focuses on undercollateralized lending.

As more users begin their DeFi journey on Hubble, and as Hubble continues developing into a stable protocol, it will one day fully decentralize into a DAO with community governance, making the protocol 100% democratically organized.

The winning submission will talk about the various features  of Hubble and provide a detailed breakdown.

Name: Hyperspace Logo Design Bounty
Description:
Hyperspace.xyz is an all-in-one NFT platform built on Solana. They allow users to discover and quickly shop for NFTs across all Solana marketplaces from one unified UI. Some of their other products include Floor Sweeper, NFT Analytics, Creator Launchpad, and Upcoming Drop Calendar.

Hyperspace is looking for a new logo that conveys what they are trying to build - the fastest and most powerful NFT platform - and in line with their mission of bringing NFTs and crypto to the masses.

Name: Incento Deep Dive
Description:
The emergence of the internet has made talent and business go global. However the rails that allow the two to exchange value are still stuck at domestic borders. Individuals and businesses face challenges around speed, complexity and high costs both transactional and the opportunity cost of holding savings in an inflationary currency.

Incento is a ‘global venmo’ facilitated by crypto dollar financial infrastructure. It is a single platform that resembles a traditional ‘fintech’ that combines the speed, connectivity and efficiency of crypto-financial infrastructure while seamlessly plugging into regional payment rails and abstracting away all the blockchain complexity under the hood.

Incento ( Request early access here ) is sponsoring a bounty to dive deep into their platform the focus being on why crypto-dollar rails are 100x better than traditional payment rails and how Incento abstracts away all the complexity that comes with accessing them.
Mission:
Become an expert on Incento and summarize your findings in a written essay.

You're welcome to write this review individually or in teams of 2. Bounties will be split among team members.
Rewards:
🥇 First Prize

  • $1000 USDC
  • Syndication in our newsletter and social media
  • Membership in the SuperteamDAO

🥈 Second Prize

  • $300 USDC

🥉 Third Prize

  • $200 USDC
Evaluation Criteria:
Depth

  • Did you explore the background of the project?
  • Does your essay talk about the key features of the project?
  • Is your essay the one-stop-resource for people to get up to speed with this project?
  • Did you learn everything there is to know about the project?
  • Did you take screenshots, provide a step by step guide to onboarding, and clearly articulate the value the project offers?
  • ‘Earning’ as cryptos on-ramp?
  • Compare stablecoin payment rails vs traditional payment rails?
  • Does your essay focus on the emergence of stable-coins, its growth and rapidly growing use cases?
  • Request early access here

Writing Style

  • Did you write a compelling introduction and a satisfying conclusion?
  • Is your writing easy and fun to read?
  • Did you avoid overly complex jargon?
  • Did you explain concepts in a way a person new to crypto could understand?    

Submission Requirements

  • Did you write your essay in English?
  • Is your submission at least 1,000 words? Note that typical bounty winners are ~2,000 words.
  • Did you submit it before the deadline? Note: there will be no deadline extensions.
  • Did you include links to your sources and references?

Check out previous bounty winners to get a sense of the quality we expect.

Name: Katana Deep Dive
Description:
Katana offers a suite of yield products across the risk spectrum, enabling users to passively access the best risk-adjusted yields in the ecosystem. By packaging complex strategies into vaults, Katana enables anyone to simply deposit into their desired vault and begin earning its yield--all without any active management or fees!

Importantly, Katana's yield is not dependent on liquidity mining programs but price action, thereby offering a diversified and more sustainable source of yield.

What sets Katana apart:

  1. Smart - Katana’s vaults use complex strategies beyond the sophistication of the average investor. We automate and optimize everything from strike selection to order execution, ensuring our samurai earn the best yields possible for any risk appetite.
  2. Simple - Although our vaults execute complex strategies, investing with Katana is incredibly simple. Just select the strategy right for you, deposit your assets, and sit back!
  3. Sustainable - Liquidity mining yields tend to zero given finite token supply. Luckily, Katana vault yields are based on price action and scale better with more capital.
  4. Straightforward - Katana does not charge any fees. Period.

Katana is used by retail investors, DAOs, DeFi protocols, institutions, and more. The protocol was the Grand Prize Winner at the Solana Ignition hackathon and can be accessed at app.katana.so.
Mission:
Become an expert on Katana and summarize your findings in a written essay.

You're welcome to write this review individually or in teams of 2. Bounties will be split among team members.
Rewards:
🥇 First Prize

  • $1,000 USDC
  • Membership in the SuperteamDAO
  • Syndication in our newsletter and social media

🥈 Second Prize

  • $300 USDC

🥉 Third Prize

  • $200 USDC
Evaluation Criteria:
Depth

  • Did you talk about Katana’s background?
  • Did you talk about Katana’s key features (what we do and how)?
  • Did you give background on what options are?
  • Did you talk about how covered call + put selling strategies in traditional finance work?
  • Did you explore the various strategies Katana offers?
  • Did you explore the payoffs of the strategies (i.e. when the strategy makes money and how much) with examples?
  • Did you include screenshots and instructions demonstrating how to use the protocol?
  • Does your essay talk about the key features of the project and its upcoming roadmap?
  • Is your essay the one-stop resource for people to get up to speed with this project?
  • Did you join Katana’s Telegram and Discord and get a feel for the community?

Writing Style

  • Did you explain concepts in a way a person new to crypto could understand?  
  • Did you write a compelling introduction and a satisfying conclusion?
  • Is your writing easy and fun to read?
  • Did you avoid overly complex jargon?

Submission Requirements

  • Did you submit before the deadline? Note: there will be no deadline extensions.
  • Did you write your essay in English?
  • Is your submission at least 1,000 words? Note that typical bounty winners are ~2,000 words.
  • Did you include links to your sources and references?

Check out previous bounty winners to get a sense of the quality we expect.

Name: Larix Deep Dive
Description:
Larix is the ultimate lending gateway on Solana. They aim to offer the ability to use a broad range of assets as collateral, including crypto, synthetics, NFTs, accounts receivables, and more. They're creating a world in which any Solana user can create liquidity for themselves, unlocking more value throughout the ecosystem.

Name: Lazy Trade Product Review
Description:
Lazy Trade is the crypto super-app for portfolio management with frictionless access to CeFi and DeFi. Users can effortlessly track, manage and trade crypto across exchanges and wallets from any webpage with our Chrome Extension. Lazy Trade will protect user wallets, increasing security by whitelisting trusted urls and contracts while flagging scams. This gives Lazy Traders a guardrail when they transact on-chain.

Lazy Trade wants you to take their Chrome Extension for a test drive 🚘. Feel free to use it for trading CeFi and DeFi in simulation and live trading, profit and loss monitoring across exchanges, portfolio tracking, on-ramping, etc.
Mission: Sign up for an account with Lazy Trade and Write a feedback report on your experience and general product recommendations that come to mind. Use the evaluation criteria and set of questions below to write your report.
Rewards:
🥇 First Prize: 

  • $700 USDC

​

🥈 Second Prize

  • $200 USDC

​

🥉 Third Prize

  • $50 for the two most helpful feedback reports

​
Evaluation Criteria:
• Evaluation Criteria:
  1. Did you use the Feedback Template ?
  2. Did you provide both positive and negative feedback in your report?
  3. Did you discuss various features of the product and your experience using it?
  4. Did you include screenshots describing the issues or highlights for positive commentary?
  5. Did you limit your responses to 70-100 words per question?

​

​

  • Submission Requirements
    • Did you write your response in English? 
    • Did you submit before the deadline? Note: there will be no deadline extensions. 
    • Product review bounty submissions do not need to be published on twitter. Include “N/A” in the airtable form.

​

Fantasy Sports is a $22 billion dollar market today, but the full potential of the industry has yet to be unleashed. Using Solana as its base, Phantasia plans to unlock new layers of utility and fun with its upcoming platform. Considering the billions of sports fans worldwide, we're bullish on sports-focused apps as one avenue to help onboard more people into crypto.

Phantasia is providing exclusive beta-access to our community in exchange for a Deep Dive review. In order to participate, simply DM @kashdhanda on Twitter and receive a beta code. You'll then be able to try out the platform and report back.
Mission:
Use Phantasia, max out all their features, learn everything you can about it, then summarize your findings in a written review.

You're welcome to write this review individually or in teams of 2. Bounties will be split among team members.
Rewards:
🥇 First Prize

  • $500 USDC
  • Admission as a Member to the SuperteamDAO
Evaluation Criteria:
Depth

  • Did you learn everything there is to know about Phantasia?
  • Did you give a perspective of where Phantasia is evolving to and what the roadmap is? (e.g. NFT skins + club level concept)?
  • Did you explain and learn about the Private Contests for NFT projects feature? Did you discuss how the "Fan Card" feature will be implemented and utilized?
  • Did you take screenshots, provide a step by step guide to onboarding, and make clear the use cases for Phantasia?
  • Is your essay the one-stop-resource for people to get up to speed with Phantasia?
  • Did you join their Discord and get a feel for the community?
  • Did you try the competitor's product?

Writing Style

  • Did you write a compelling introduction and a satisfying conclusion?
  • Is your writing easy and fun to read?
  • Did you use simple language?
  • Did you explain concepts in a way a person new to crypto could understand?

Check out previous bounty winners to get a sense of the quality we expect.
Resources:
• Phantasia Website
  • Guide to the Beta
  • Additional Information about the Club Concept
  • Phantasia Twitter
  • Phantasia Discord

For any questions, DM @kashdhanda on Twitter or @kash in our Discord
Terms and Conditions: Participation in this bounty is entirely voluntary. Bounties are a way to learn and dabble in opportunities to build in web3. These are neither full time jobs nor project based engagement. Please be advised that the sponsors will not have time for individualised feedback due to the number of entries we receive.

Name: Pillow Fund Short Video Bounty
Description:
Pillow is a digital asset management app that helps users get the best staking returns on their digital assets with no associated hassles. From one single app, users get access to staking rewards across multiple tokens (MATIC, SOL, AXS and more). They also have non-staking yield options in BTC, USDx, ETH.

Pillow aims to make it as simple as possible for users to start earning the best staking returns on their crypto. Today, to invest in DeFi and start earning staking returns, users have to jump through multiple hoops: right from setting up an on-chain wallet to transferring their crypto on-chain to understanding gas fees, bridging and many other aspects.

While there is so much value being created in DeFi, the process needs to be much simpler for the users. That’s where Pillow steps in. Pillow enables single click staking - Users just have to transfer their crypto to their Pillow account and they start earning returns immediately. Pillow does all the heavy lifting at the backend while ensuring a seamless investment journey on the front end.

Investments on Pillow across MATIC, SOL, AXS are also fully transparent and liquid - so a user has control of their assets at all points.

Pillow just launched their Solana Case with 20.75% boosted returns, they are working with the best staking solution in the industry, Marinade, to power safe and secure yields for Solana.

The objective of this bounty is to create a short, fun and engaging video about Pillow, and how people can earn passive income on their investments, without any hassles.

🎯

​
Mission: Understand the Pillow app, Based on your understanding, create fun short videos (Reel format) to drive awareness around the Pillow app and how users can earn staking rewards & yields easily through Pillow.Note that the format of video required is 30-45 second short format. There is no restriction on creativity as long as the video is fun and engaging.Upload the video on Twitter or Instagram and use the hashtag #PillowXSolana & Tag @pillowfund on Twitter/Instagram and submit the link.You're welcome to prepare these videos individually or in teams. Bounties will be split among team members.
Rewards:
🥇 First Prize:

  • $800 USDC
  • You’ll be added as a Contributor in SuperteamDAO

🥈 Second Prize

  • 7 Runner Up Prizes - $100 each

✏️ Note:

  1. There is no restriction on the number of entries you can submit
  2. One person can win through multiple video entries

‍
Evaluation Criteria:
1. Quality of the script: Is the script of the reel engaging?
  2. Does it cover basic concepts from a user’s point of view?
  3. Quality of video: How well produced is the video?
  4. Are the edits and transitions seamless?
  5. Creative engagement: Is the video fun to watch for a user? Will it drive engagement on the Pillow app?
  6. References: Are you taking fun and relatable references from current trends?
  7. Understanding of the Pillow app: Does the reel display that you understood the core value proposition of the Pillow app and communicated it with the end-user

Submission Requirements

  • Did you submit before the deadline?
  • The submission needs to be uploaded on Twitter or Instagram and use the hashtag #PillowXSolana & Tag @pillowfund on Twitter/Instagram and submit the link.
  • Preferred Language: English
  • Note: there will be no deadline extensions.

​

‍
Resources:
• Pillow FAQs
  • Pillow Website
  • Pillow Android App
  • Pillow IOS App
  • Reference Video 1 Reference Video 2
  • Pillow Logos

Name: Port Finance Bug Bounty
Description:
Port Finance aims to provide a whole suite of money market products. They aim to provide variable rate lending, fixed rate lending and also interest rate swap products. Their backers include Jump Capital, Alameda Research, Defi Alliance, a41 and founders of other Solana projects such as Mercurial, Solanium and Raydium.

They are the first variable rate lending product that is live on Solana. Currently, Port Finance supports 13 different assets from the Solana, Ethereum, Terra and Bitcoin networks.

In December 2021, they launched their first fixed rate lending product Sundial and they believe that the fixed rate lending protocol will unleash the true potential of the Solana blockchain by providing an effective interest rate discovery mechanism using Serum.
Mission: Explore Port Finance and report smart contracts bugs that could cause 1) Loss of any user funds 2) Insolvency of the platform
Rewards:
🥇Reward tiers by threat level:

Critical

  1. Prize Amounts: Up to $500,000 & a minimum of $50,000 ( At the discretion of the team)

High

  1. Prize Amounts: $20,000

Note: You can make reasonable assumptions about the severity based on your experience and include the same in your application.

​

‍

‍
Resources:
• All Port Finance Smart contracts
  • Port Finance Website
  • Port Finance App
  • Port Finance Discord
  • Port Finance Discord

  • Port Finance Litepaper

For any questions, [DM @Abbasshaikh42] (http://(https://twitter.com/Abbasshaikh42))on Twitter or @abbas in our Discord

  1. Smart Contract - Port Finance Variable Rate Lending

https://github.com/port-finance/variable-rate-lending/

  1. Smart Contract - Port Finance Staking

Name: Port Finance Deep Dive
Description:
Port Finance has already, in the short time since its launch, attracted widespread attention for its innovative suite of money market products on Solana. With more than $325m in TVL, their lending protocol offers a range of fixed income products with many more on the way.

We're partnering with them to offer a bounty for a written review of the platform, its features, and the upcoming roadmap. Any comparison of competitive products is useful as well.
Mission:
Use Port Finance (and its closest competitors), max out all their features, learn everything you can about it, then summarize your findings in a written review.

You're welcome to write this review individually or in teams of 2. Bounties will be split among team members.
Rewards:
🥇 First Prize

  • $500 USD worth of $PORT tokens
  • A .sol domain of your choosing
  • Instant access to the Member level of the SuperteamDAO
  • Syndication in the Superteam newsletter and Twitter
Evaluation Criteria:
Depth

  • Did you learn everything there is to know about the project?
  • Did you take screenshots, provide a step by step guide to onboarding, and clearly articulate the value the project offers to users?
  • Is your essay the one-stop-resource for people to get up to speed with this project?
  • Did you join their Discord and get a feel for the community?
  • Did you try the competition and explain relative pros/cons of this project?

Writing Style

  • Did you write a compelling introduction and a satisfying conclusion?
  • Is your writing easy and fun to read?
  • Did you avoid overly complex jargon?
  • Did you explain concepts in a way a person new to crypto could understand?

Name: Pyth Network Deep Dive
Description:
The vast majority of smart contracts need external data from the real world to perform their services. Oracles perform as gateways between the blockchain and these external data sources.

Pyth network is an oracle which unlocks once-exclusive financial markets data and makes it available for DeFi and the general public.

The goal of Pyth is to make every asset price available on every chain for the world, and in doing so, empower data owners and users. Pyth currently specializes in pricing data for crypto, FX, equities, and commodities.

Pyth, sources its data directly from best-in-class global financial market participants , including market makers, global exchanges , and trading firms. These include some of the biggest names in traditional and decentralized finance who truly know what the price of any asset is at any time.

‍
Mission: Become an expert on Pyth Network and summarize your findings in a written essay . Highlight projects that are using Pyth today & point out potential future applications you’d like to see. Summarise the competitive landscape including threat & opportunities for pyth.You're welcome to write this review individually or in teams of 2. Bounties will be split among team members.
Rewards:
🥇 First Prize:

  • $1000 USDC
  • Syndication in our newsletter and social media
  • You’ll be added as a Contributor in Superteam

🥈 Second Prize

  • $300 USDC

🥉 Third Prize

  • $200 USDC

‍
Evaluation Criteria:
Depth

  • Did you explore the background of the project?
  • Does your essay talk about the key features of the project?
  • Is your essay the one-stop-resource for people to get up to speed with this project?
  • Did you learn everything there is to know about the project?
  • Did you take screenshots, provide a step by step guide to onboarding, and clearly articulate the value the project offers?
  • Did you join the project’s Discord and get a feel for the community?
  • Did you try the competition and explain relative pros/cons of this project?

‍

Writing Style

  • Did you write a compelling introduction and a satisfying conclusion?
  • Is your writing easy and fun to read?
  • Did you avoid overly complex jargon?
  • Did you explain concepts in a way a person new to crypto could understand?

‍‍

Submission Requirements

  • Did you write your essay in English?
  • Is your submission at least 1,000 words? Note that typical bounty winners are ~2,000 words.
  • Did you submit before the deadline? Note: there will be no deadline extensions.
  • Did you include links to your sources under the title “References”? If you have used external sources and no references are included, your bounty could be rejected on grounds of plagiarism.
  • Kindly test your submission for plagiarism. If the submission contains more than 5% plagiarised content, your submission will be rejected. Regular offenders can also be disqualified from participating in the bounty program going forward.
  • Share your submission on Twitter & tag @superteamdao + @pythnetwork & use the hashtag #Superteambounty and submit this link in your bounty application.

Name: Saros Finance UI/UX Review
Description:
Saros Finance is a Solana-based Unified Suite of DeFi Products with three fundamental building blocks: SarosSwap (AMM), SarosFarm (Pool), and SarosStake with SarosSwap being the core of the entire ecosystem.

Understanding that UI/UX should be the key focus when onboarding millions of users, the Saros team is sponsoring a bounty for a talented UX/UI designer to improve their platform and make it easier to use. Please note this includes the landing page, swap, liquidity and pools pages.
Mission:
Conduct a thorough UI/UX review for Saros Finance that matches this example in quality.

You're welcome to complete this review individually or in teams of 2. Bounties will be split among team members.
Rewards:
🥇 First Prize

  • $3,000 worth of C98 tokens
  • Membership in the SuperteamDAO
  • Syndication in our newsletter and social media
Evaluation Criteria:
Depth

  • Did you identify problems for each screen you examined?
  • Did you explain what the user goals are for the different areas of the product you're reviewing?
  • Did you include screenshots of the existing designs?
  • Did you create a new design that solves the problems you identified?
  • Did you redesign the marketing website as well as any application or interior pages? In other words, did you redesign everything that is publicly visible?
  • Did you package your review into a nice presentation (e.g. Notion, Google Slides, Figma, etc)?

Check out previous bounty winners to get a sense of the quality we expect.
Resources:
• Superteam’s guidelines on how to write a great deep dive essay
  • Saros Finance Website
  • Saros Finance Docs
  • Saros Finance Discord

Name: SolDev Logo Design
Description:
Learning to code in a new ecosystem is always a challenge. This is doubly true in a rapidly evolving space like Solana. Fortunately, SolDev exists to make developing on Solana easier. On their website, devs can find everything from tutorials to frameworks to a program library, and much more. If you’re developing on Solana (or you know someone who is), SolDev is a must-bookmark.

As they look to onboard and accelerate the learning journeys of more developers, SolDev wants a fresh logo. This logo should convey the depth of knowledge that is housed in SolDev while leveraging a color palette similar to Solana itself.
Mission: Design a logo for the SolDev that is visually appealing and can stand out.
Rewards:
🥇 First Prize

  • $750 USDC
  • Membership in the SuperteamDAO
Evaluation Criteria:
Requirements

  • Must represent Sol Dev & be visually appealing.
  • Must be submitted as a Figma, Invision, or other digitally editable design file

Visual Design

  • Is your design aesthetically stunning?
  • Does the logo provide a glimpse of the use case of SolDev?  
  • Would the Solana community resonate with your logo design?
  • Will your logo design attract people to the project?
Resources:
• SolDev Twitter
  • SolDev Website
  • Reference logo for inspiration - Solana Cookbook

For any questions, DM @Abbasshaikh42 on Twitter or @abbas in our Discord

Coding in a new ecosystem is always challenging for new devs, and even the most experienced devs forget how to write particular functionality from time to time. The Solana Cookbook helps fix this friction for Solana dApp development.

Each "recipe" in the Cookbook has guidance and code snippets for devs to deploy in their projects. And, to make things even better, the Cookbook is entirely open source and open to contributions.

To help the Solana Cookbook standout, we're sponsoring a bounty to design a Web3 appropriate logo for them.
Mission: Design a logo for the Solana Cookbook that is visually appealing and can stand out.
Rewards:
🥇 First Prize

  • $1,000 USDC
  • Membership in the SuperteamDAO
  • Syndication in our newsletter and social media
Evaluation Criteria:
Requirements

  • Must represent the Solana Cookbook & be visually appealing.
  • Must be submitted as a Figma, Invision, or other digitally editable design file

Visual Design

  • Is your design aesthetically stunning?
  • Does the logo provide a glimpse of the use case of Solana Cookbook?  
  • Would the Solana community resonate with your logo design?
  • Will your logo design attract people to the project?
Resources:
• Solana Cookbook Website

For any questions, [DM @Abbasshaikh42] (http://(https://twitter.com/Abbasshaikh42))on Twitter or @abbas in our Discord
Terms and Conditions: Participation in this bounty is entirely voluntary. Bounties are a way to learn and dabble in opportunities to build in web3. These are neither full time jobs nor project based engagement. Please be advised that the sponsors will not have time for individualised feedback due to the number of entries we receive.

Name: Solend Deep Dive
Description:
Lending and borrowing are the foundation of the DeFi landscape. Solend is a fascinating project aiming to become the #1 lending protocol in the Solana ecosystem. With more than $700m in TVL and investors ranging from Coinbase to Alameda, their platform has been growing like a weed in recent weeks.

DeFi can feel overwhelming for new users, so Solend is sponsoring a bounty to dive deep into their platform. The winning submission will not only talk about how Solend works, but why someone might want to use it in the first place. What are the use cases for lending protocols? What kind of strategies and benefits does Solend support? How does it fit into the Solana DeFi ecosystem?
Mission: Become an expert on Solend and summarize your findings in a written essay. You're welcome to write this review individually or in teams of 2. Bounties will be split among team members.
Rewards:
🥇 First Prize

  • $500 USD worth of $SLND
  • Membership in the SuperteamDAO
  • Syndication in our newsletter and social media

🥈 Second Prize

  • $300 USD worth of $SLND

🥉 Third Prize

  • $200 USD worth of $SLND
Evaluation Criteria:
Depth

  • Did you explore the background of Solend?
  • Did you learn about all of the programs (e.g. bug bounty, insurance fund, etc) Solend has?
  • Did you discuss the Liquidity Mining Program?
  • Did you explain the various strategies enabled by lending protocols? (e.g lending, borrowing to short, borrowing to go leverage long, borrowing to avoid short term taxes on selling, etc)
  • Did you take screenshots, provide a step by step guide to onboarding, and clearly articulate the value the project offers?
  • Is your essay the one-stop-resource for people to get up to speed with this project?
  • Did you join their Discord and get a feel for the community?
  • Did you explain concepts in a way a person new to crypto / or coming from Ethereum could understand?

Writing Style

  • Did you write a compelling introduction and a satisfying conclusion?
  • Is your writing easy and fun to read?
  • Did you avoid overly complex jargon?
  • Did you explain concepts in a way a person new to crypto could understand?  

Check out previous bounty winners to get a sense of the quality we expect.
Resources:
• Solend Website
  • ‍Solend Blog
  • ‍Solend Discord
  • ‍Solend Github
  • ‍Solend Twitter
  • ‍Fundraising announcement

‍For any questions, DM @kashdhanda on Twitter or @kash in our Discord
Terms and Conditions: Participation in this bounty is entirely voluntary. Bounties are a way to learn and dabble in opportunities to build in web3. These are neither full time jobs nor project based engagement. Please be advised that the sponsors will not have time for individualised feedback due to the number of entries we receive.

Name: Solend Deep Dive Bounty
Description:
Solend is an algorithmic, decentralized protocol for lending and borrowing on Solana. They aim to be the easiest to use and most secure solution available. Using their protocol, users can earn interest on crypto assets, borrow, get leverage, and even short other assets.

Recently, Solend has launched two exciting new products. First is their “cToken”, which allows users to earn interest on a token while still being able to use it in other DeFi applications. Second is their Isolated Pools offering. These are separate lending markets where assets can be “quarantined” for a single purpose, in contrast to cross-collateral pools where any assets can be borrowed against any others.

Solend is now sponsoring a deep dive bounty for their  cTokens and isolated pools offerings to help users get up to speed with the recent developments. The winning submission will provide a complete breakdown and adhere to our deep dive essay guidelines.
Mission:
Become an expert on Solend’s cTokens and Isolated Pool offerings. Write a deep dive essay that explains the concepts and their real-world use cases in an easy-to-understand manner.

You're welcome to write this review individually or in teams of 2. Bounties will be split among team members.
Rewards:
🥇 First Prize

  • $750 SLND
  • Membership in the SuperteamDAO
  • Syndication in our newsletter and social media

🥈 Second Prize

  • $250 SLND
Evaluation Criteria:
Depth

  • Did you discuss the cTokens in-depth?
  • Did you include new ideas on how cTokens could be used in the future by developers?
  • Did you provide a step-by-step guide for minting/redeeming cTokens?
  • Did you discuss isolated pool offerings and why they are useful?
  • Did you include screenshots and instructions demonstrating how to use the isolated pools?
  • Did you discuss the risks of isolated pool offerings?
  • Is your essay the one-stop-resource for people to get up to speed with this project?

Writing Style

  • Did you explain concepts in a way a person new to crypto could understand?  
  • Did you write a compelling introduction and a satisfying conclusion?
  • Is your writing easy and fun to read?
  • Did you avoid overly complex jargon?

Submission Requirements

  • Did you submit before the deadline? Note: there will be no deadline extensions.
  • Did you write your essay in English?
  • Is your submission at least 1,000 words? Note that typical bounty winners are ~2,000 words.
  • Did you include links to your sources and references?

Check out previous bounty winners to get a sense of the quality we expect.
Resources:
• Superteam’s guidelines on how to write a great deep dive essay
  • ‍Solend Twitter
  • ‍Solend Discord
  • ‍Solend Website
  • ‍Solend Docs
  • ‍Solend Isolated Pools
  • ‍Solend cTokens

Name: Solend Development Bounty
Description:
Solend is an algorithmic, decentralized protocol for lending and borrowing on Solana. By using Solana, Solend is 100x faster and 100x cheaper than similar offerings on other chains.

Solend aims to be the easiest and most secure solution on Solana. Using their protocol, users can earn interest on crypto assets, borrow, get leverage, and even short other assets.

To catalyze more development in their ecosystem, Solend is sponsoring a bounty for a talented engineer to develop an Anchor client for Solend.
Mission: Write and document an Anchor client for Solend that supports all of the callable methods.
Rewards:
🥇 First Prize

  • $5000 USDC
  • Membership in the SuperteamDAO
Evaluation Criteria:
• Did you cover all the methods exposed in the Solend program?
  • Did you document all the methods in your client?
  • Have you added tests cases for all the methods?
  • Have you provided usage examples?
